description.value: This spell causes your hand to glow with a pale blue radiance. Your melee touch attack deals 4d6 points of cold damage and causes the target to be staggered for 1 round. If the attack is a critical hit, the target is staggered for 1 minute instead. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
